zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelheid von Pottenstein於1057年出生在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 史維音福特時，她的父親Boto von Pottenstein Graf von Botenstein32歲，母親Judith von Schweinfurt21歲。她和Hendrik I van Limburg至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1106年8月13日之後在比利時利包格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelheid von Pottenstein于1057年出生在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 史維音福特时，她的父亲Boto von Pottenstein Graf von Botenstein32岁，母亲Judith von Schweinfurt21岁。她和Hendrik I van Limburg至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1106年8月13日之后在比利时利包格。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Pottenstein
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: topographic name from an uncertain elemen+ Middle High German stein ‘stone’; possibly an altered form of Hartenstein .

variants.name: Hartenstein
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Hermann, Reiner.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from any of several places called Hartenstein, in Saxony and Bavaria.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name composed of German hart ‘hard’ + Stein ‘rock, stone’.

nameMeanings.name: Adelheid
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelheid von Pottenstein was born in 1057, in Schweinfurt, Bavaria, Germany, her father, Boto von Pottenstein Graf von Botenstein, was 32 and her mother, Judith von Schweinfurt, was 21. She had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Hendrik I van Limburg. She died after 13 August 1106, in Limburg, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelheid von Pottenstein est née en 1057, à Landkreis Schweinfurt, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Boto von Pottenstein Graf von Botenstein, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Judith von Schweinfurt, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Hendrik I van Limburg. Elle est décédée après 13 août 1106, à Limbourg, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelheid von Pottenstein 1057 in Landkreis Schweinfurt, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Boto von Pottenstein Graf von Botenstein 32 und ihre Mutter Judith von Schweinfurt 21. Sie hatte mit Hendrik I van Limburg mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 13. August 1106 in Limburg, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelheid von Pottenstein è nata il nel 1057 nel Landkreis Schweinfurt, Bayern, Germania, sua padre, Boto von Pottenstein Graf von Botenstein, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Judith von Schweinfurt, aveva 21 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Hendrik I van Limburg. Morì dopo il 13 agosto 1106, nel Limburgo, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelheid von Pottensteinが1057年にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス スチウエインファートで生まれた時，父Boto von Pottenstein Graf von Botensteinは32歳，母Judith von Schweinfurtは21歳であった。彼女はHendrik I van Limburgとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1106年8月13日以後にベルギーリンブルグで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelheid von Pottenstein(이)가 1057년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 슈위퍼트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Boto von Pottenstein Graf von Botenstein(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Judith von Schweinfurt(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Hendrik I van Limburg(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1106년 8월 13일 이후 벨기에 림버그에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelheid von Pottenstein nasceu em 1057, em Landkreis Schweinfurt, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Boto von Pottenstein Graf von Botenstein, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Judith von Schweinfurt, tinha 21 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Hendrik I van Limburg. Ela faleceu após 13 de agosto de 1106, em Limburgo, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelheid von Pottenstein родилась в 1057 г. в местности ландкрис щвинфурт, беиирн, Германия, её отцу по имени Boto von Pottenstein Graf von Botenstein было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Judith von Schweinfurt, 21. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Hendrik I van Limburg. Она умерла после 13 августа 1106 г. в местности лимбург, Бельгия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adelheid von Pottenstein nació en 1057, en Landkreis Schweinfurt, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Boto von Pottenstein Graf von Botenstein, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Judith von Schweinfurt, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Hendrik I van Limburg. Murió después de 13 de agosto de 1106, en Limburgo, Bélgica.
